A unique story that explores the mysterious real-life phenomena of crop signs and the effects they have on one man and his family.

programme.desc: Buzz explores a cave to look for glow worms, goes diving at the Poor Knights and builds an awesome obstacle course for his new remote controlled car.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!

programme.title: What Will I Be Today?
programme.desc: Join your new friends Kauri, Esera and Wing Gai as they go on imaginative adventures to solve every day problems.

programme.title: Bird's Eye View
programme.desc: The birds decide to get away from the noise of the city. Unfortunately, the Humans have the same idea. What are they doing now?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Megamind Rules!
programme.desc: Megamind is back, but he's turning over a new leaf. Instead of terrorising Metro City, Megamind is going good: ditching his evil ways to protect the city as the world's first superhero influencer.

programme.title: Mr Hugo's Little Library
programme.desc: A sheepish sheep gets a little help from her friends while an ambitious superhero learns a little can go a long way.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: Tipua
programme.desc: Determined to understand the whakapapa of the mysterious taonga Ārepa does some research and discovers the tohunga in her dreams is somehow linked to the hei tiki. S1 E4

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: Coaches Michael Bublé, Niall Horan, Reba McEntire and Snoop Dogg all vie to discover and coach the next singing phenomenon on the sixth and final night of blind auditions.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Tane faces the music. Brax dreams of a better life. David fights for Lacey’s freedom.

programme.title: Home Economics
programme.desc: When the Hayworths can’t agree where to trick-or-treat, they find themselves in their own horror stories. S2 E6

programme.title: Cats & Dogs 2: The Revenge Of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: When Kitty Galore, a rogue spy, devises a plan to destroy all human and canine life, the dogs and cats have to put their ongoing battle on hold to stop her from executing her evil plot. (2010)

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the final match in Round 2 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Tactix host the Pulse from Wolfbrook Arean in Christchurch.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon is forced to take a vacation by the university, he goes to work with Amy in her neurobiology lab. Meanwhile, Bernadette wants Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement. S5 E16

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A mechanic leads his friend astray and there are four GOATs in a vehicle, and one in the boot. Tough consequences for a driver with drugs in his system, and he’s never held a licence.
